allow: Bash(git config user.email "glenn.r.tomassi@gmail.com" && git config user.name "GlennRTC")

Bash(node "./.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" commit "docs\(01\): update plans for Docker Compose dev environment" --files .planning/phases/01-foundation/01-01-PLAN.md .planning/phases/01-foundation/01-02-PLAN.md .planning/phases/01-foundation/01-03-PLAN.md)

Bash(node "./.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state update-progress 2>&1 && node "./.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state record-metric --phase "02-core-crud" --plan "03" --duration "20" --tasks "3" --files "4" 2>&1)

Bash(node "./.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision --phase "02-core-crud" --summary "requirePendingOrder shared helper across all three Server Actions — single status guard, no duplication" 2>&1 && node "./.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision --phase "02-core-crud" --summary "Phase 2 PDF upload stores pending-upload/{filename} placeholder only — Supabase Storage deferred to Phase 3" 2>&1)
Bash(node "./.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" requirements mark-complete ORD-04 ORD-05 ORD-06 2>&1)
Bash(docker exec labflash-app-1 npm install --save-dev @types/qrcode 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(docker exec labflash-app-1 npm list jest ts-jest 2>&1 | head -10)
Bash(node "./.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" requirements mark-complete DEL-01 DEL-02 DEL-03 DEL-04 DEL-05 PORTAL-01 PORTAL-02 PORTAL-03 PORTAL-04 PORTAL-05 PORTAL-06 INFRA-06 INFRA-07 2>&1)
